title: Event

resourceType.description: FHIR-style discriminator naming this resource type; MUST equal the resource type name.

id.description: Opaque, order-comparable identifier for this event within its session stream. Used as the listSessionEvents pagination cursor and to establish the event ordering conformant adapters must preserve.

at.description: Timestamp the event was emitted, as an ISO 8601 date-time. A UTC `Z` designator or a numeric zone offset (e.g. `+12:00`) is accepted, so implementations in any timezone can emit locally-offset timestamps.

type.description: Discriminant: the start of a new assistant message.

messageId.description: Identifier of the assistant message beginning.

oneOf.description: Marks the start of a new assistant message.

resourceType.description: FHIR-style discriminator naming this resource type; MUST equal the resource type name.

id.description: Opaque, order-comparable identifier for this event within its session stream. Used as the listSessionEvents pagination cursor and to establish the event ordering conformant adapters must preserve.

at.description: Timestamp the event was emitted, as an ISO 8601 date-time. A UTC `Z` designator or a numeric zone offset (e.g. `+12:00`) is accepted, so implementations in any timezone can emit locally-offset timestamps.

type.description: Discriminant: an incremental text chunk of an assistant message.

messageId.description: Identifier of the assistant message this text chunk belongs to.

delta.description: The incremental text content of this chunk.

oneOf.description: An incremental text chunk of an in-progress assistant message.

resourceType.description: FHIR-style discriminator naming this resource type; MUST equal the resource type name.

id.description: Opaque, order-comparable identifier for this event within its session stream. Used as the listSessionEvents pagination cursor and to establish the event ordering conformant adapters must preserve.

at.description: Timestamp the event was emitted, as an ISO 8601 date-time. A UTC `Z` designator or a numeric zone offset (e.g. `+12:00`) is accepted, so implementations in any timezone can emit locally-offset timestamps.

type.description: Discriminant: the end of an assistant message.

messageId.description: Identifier of the assistant message ending.

oneOf.description: Marks the end of an assistant message.

resourceType.description: FHIR-style discriminator naming this resource type; MUST equal the resource type name.

id.description: Opaque, order-comparable identifier for this event within its session stream. Used as the listSessionEvents pagination cursor and to establish the event ordering conformant adapters must preserve.

at.description: Timestamp the event was emitted, as an ISO 8601 date-time. A UTC `Z` designator or a numeric zone offset (e.g. `+12:00`) is accepted, so implementations in any timezone can emit locally-offset timestamps.

delta.description: The incremental thinking content of this chunk.

oneOf.description: An incremental chunk of the assistant's extended thinking.

resourceType.description: FHIR-style discriminator naming this resource type; MUST equal the resource type name.

id.description: Opaque, order-comparable identifier for this event within its session stream. Used as the listSessionEvents pagination cursor and to establish the event ordering conformant adapters must preserve.

at.description: Timestamp the event was emitted, as an ISO 8601 date-time. A UTC `Z` designator or a numeric zone offset (e.g. `+12:00`) is accepted, so implementations in any timezone can emit locally-offset timestamps.

type.description: Discriminant: an invocation of a custom (non-builtin, non-MCP) tool.

toolUseId.description: Identifier correlating this tool use to its eventual result.

name.description: Name of the custom tool being invoked.

input.description: The input arguments passed to the custom tool.

oneOf.description: An invocation of a custom tool defined on the AgentDefinition.

type.description: Discriminant: an invocation of a provider-hosted builtin tool.

toolUseId.description: Identifier correlating this tool use to its eventual result.

name.description: Name of the builtin tool being invoked.

input.description: The input arguments passed to the builtin tool.

oneOf.description: An invocation of a provider-hosted builtin tool.

at.description: Timestamp the event was emitted, as an ISO 8601 date-time. A UTC `Z` designator or a numeric zone offset (e.g. `+12:00`) is accepted, so implementations in any timezone can emit locally-offset timestamps.

oneOf.description: A transition in the session's status.

resourceType.description: FHIR-style discriminator naming this resource type; MUST equal the resource type name.

id.description: Opaque, order-comparable identifier for this event within its session stream. Used as the listSessionEvents pagination cursor and to establish the event ordering conformant adapters must preserve.

recoverable.description: Whether the session can continue after this error (e.g. via drain) or is terminally failed.

oneOf.description: An error condition encountered while executing the session.

description: A normalised session-stream event, discriminated by `type`.
